message:
test(agent_mail_bridge): add proptest suite for mail bridge types

29 tests (9 unit + 20 property) covering serde roundtrip for all 8
public types (MessageId, MailMessage, ReservationStatus/Result,
FileConflict, AgentRegistration, SendResponse, ReleaseResponse),
forward-compatibility via extra HashMap fields, error Display/Clone/Eq,
and default stability. Feature-gated behind agent-mail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
